Q

qr_eventQRCodeFormat_matchesExpectedPrefix() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.06.01 Verifies that the QR code stored on a public Event object matches the expected format used by QRScanActivity to parse eventID.
qr_invalidString_returnsNull() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.06.01 Verifies that an unrecognised QR string returns null.
qr_nullString_returnsNull() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.06.01 Verifies that a null raw value returns null safely.
qr_privateEvent_hasNoQRCode() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.06.01 Verifies that a private event has no QR code — private events should not generate a promotional QR (US 02.01.02).
qr_validJunimoString_parsesEventId() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
US 01.06.01 Verifies that a valid junimo QR string is correctly recognised.
QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest - Class in com.example.junimoapp
Local unit tests for QR code scanning and private invite accept/decline logic.

QRScanActivity - Class in com.example.junimoapp
US 01.06.01 Entrant wants to be able to view event details by scanning a QR code.
